svg.title: Case 5, stronger edge case collapse
svg.desc: Left half: Ronaldo stands calmly with the ball at his feet, no chaos. Right half: the U19 team is scattered, passing lines broken, multiple fires around the pitch, a pigeon on the penalty spot, a deflated ball, and question marks above most players.
svg.text: Case 5 — the stadium is on fire
Edge cases tear agent frameworks apart at the seams
Every hand-off is a place to fail
